title: Man fatally stabbed near mobile pot dispensary in Bronx late-night attack
summary_full: A 35-year-old man was fatally stabbed late Saturday night in the Bronx, found collapsed next to a brightly colored mobile cannabis dispensary. Responders arrived at the scene on Webster Avenue to find the victim with a chest stab wound. He was transported to St. Barnabas Hospital and pronounced dead. The investigation into the stabbing is ongoing.
